name: che-transport-mcp
description: Taiwan TDX transport MCP — 23 tools across Rail / Bus / Bike / Air / Maritime / Traffic / Parking. Wraps PsychQuant/che-transport-mcp v0.2.0 binary with version-aware auto-download (release-pinned + sha256 sidecar), 3-tier cache TTL (24h static / 1h timetable / 0s live), parallel cross-system station search, NSQL confirmation discipline for ambiguous queries.
